---
description: 'General coding conventions and guidelines for the project.'
---

-  make sure to respect python.instructions.md when implementing python code. This file contains important guidelines for writing clean and maintainable Python code 

- make sure to respect ui.instructions.md when implementing the user interface of a  web app. This file contains important guidelines for building a modern and appealing UI using Vue and Tailwind CSS.

- make sure to respect cli.instructions.md when implementing the command line interface of the project, if any. This file contains important guidelines for building a user-friendly and consistent CLI.

-  make sure you always run ./validate.sh when implementing a new feature or fixing a bug. This will ensure that your code adheres to the project's 
coding standards and passes all tests before being merged into the main branch.
-  make sure to keep readme.md up to date with any new features or changes you make to the project. 

- if implementing a web app with a backend api, make sure to split the frontend and backend code into separate directories. For example, you can have a `frontend` directory for the Vue app and a `backend` directory for the FastAPI app. This will help keep the code organized and maintainable.
